message:
fix: resolve 4 dashboard sync issues (#7252, #7253, #7254, #7255) (#7266)

- Include card config in backend update payload so existing cards
  stay in sync after config changes (#7252)
- Preserve per-card position (w/h) from template definitions when
  applying dashboard templates (#7253)
- Allow fullSync to clear local cache when backend has zero cards
  instead of silently keeping stale cards (#7254)
- Compare card types in order (not sorted) so pure reorder is
  detected as customization (#7255)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
